text.title: PLG Optimization Tactics Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: free-to-paid plateau at 4.2% triggers a 5-tactic ranked backlog.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Mid-stage PLG SaaS. Free-to-paid 30-day conversion has held flat at 4.2% for two quarters. Activation D7 is healthy (62%) so the weakness is in the upgrade path, not onboarding.

section.title: Output
